## Single-file impact

transferable artifacts: `mycli_lite.py` on CPython 3.10 through 3.14 and
`mycli_lite_legacy.py` on CPython 2.7.9 through 2.7.18 or 3.4 through 3.9. Note
any expected size, protocol-compatibility, or older-standard-library impact. If
parity is not possible, explain why and how the legacy artifact will fail
safely.
